rationale: No direct conflict. §21.4032 governs proportional salary reductions only if a district reduces teacher salaries based on financial conditions. Increasing the homestead exemption may pressure district finances but does not alter or contradict this trigger-and-response rule.
quote: This section applies only to a widespread reduction in the amount of the annual salaries paid to school district classroom teachers based primarily on district financial conditions rather than on teacher performance.
_note: No textual conflict; indirect fiscal pressure on districts does not trigger a statutory conflict with §21.4032.
